steps.name: lock-render-contracts
steps.summary: Added reusable pose head-facing helper while keeping getRupaHeadFacing compatible; locked left/right/back facing contracts for active arm controls and asymmetric hand reach.

steps.name: add-minimal-skeleton-renderer
steps.summary: Added SVG-only MinimalSkeletonCharacterLayer that consumes SkeletonPose and SkeletonBodyModel, renders thin readable body guides with subtle head-facing expressions, and preserves pointerEvents none.

steps.name: switch-main-default-keep-lab-rig
steps.summary: Switched SkeletonPoseOverlay to default to the minimal skeleton renderer, kept main simulation explicit, and preserved skeleton lab PNG variants with an added minimal renderer option.

steps.name: document-visual-pivot-and-verify
steps.summary: Documented the visual pivot from monkey-forward character art to a routefinding-first minimal skeleton, clarified PNG rig preservation for lab/legacy/mascot experiments, and verified main simulation uses minimalSkeleton while skeleton lab still exposes PNG variants. npm test, npx tsc --noEmit, and git diff --check passed.
